_doc: Per-image Gemini prompts for The 2026 Low-Ticket Funnel Playbook. {palette} resolves at runtime.

cover.prompt:
Editorial book cover for a downloadable lead magnet PDF. Aspect: portrait, 3:4, US letter book cover proportions.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed under TEXT TO RENDER below. No other text. No font names. No instructions. No labels beyond what is listed.
2. Never render the words "Inter", "Inter Regular", "Inter Display Bold", "JetBrains Mono", "sans serif", or any typography or font instruction inside the image.
3. Spell every rendered word exactly as written, character for character.

TEXT TO RENDER (exactly these pieces):
A. Top-left small pill, uppercase, two words: FREE PLAYBOOK
B. Upper-left massive headline across three lines: line 1 reads "The 2026", line 2 reads "Low-Ticket", line 3 reads "Funnel Playbook".
C. Subtitle inside a horizontal off-white translucent panel below the headline, two lines: line 1 reads "Funnel math, 7-step architecture, page-by-page specs,", line 2 reads "vertical plays, the 7-day buyer email sequence."
D. Below the subtitle panel, a small uppercase label, three words: WHAT IS INSIDE
E. A grid of 8 small pills below the WHAT IS INSIDE label, arranged as 2 rows of 4 pills. The 4 pills in the top row read, left to right: "Funnel Math", "Architecture", "Pages", "Vertical Plays". The 4 pills in the bottom row read, left to right: "Email Sequence", "Compliance", "Pricing", "Failures".
F. Bottom-left small wordmark: AI BrandFactory

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Headline: massive bold sans-serif display face, off-white #FAF9FF, tight letter spacing.
- Subtitle: clean medium-weight sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside the off-white panel.
- Top-left pill: condensed mono-spaced face, bright cyan #06B6D4.
- WHAT IS INSIDE label: condensed mono-spaced face, bright cyan #06B6D4, small.
- Pill grid text: clean sans-serif medium weight, off-white #FAF9FF, small. Pills are rounded rectangles with thin bright cyan #06B6D4 outline and translucent dark indigo fill.
- Wordmark: clean light-weight sans-serif, off-white.

Design language:
- Premium funnel-art style, editorial restraint.
- Background: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient at 135 degrees, subtle bright cyan bloom upper right.
- Layout: headline and subtitle in upper half, WHAT IS INSIDE label and pill grid in middle to lower portion.
- A single thin diagonal accent line in bright cyan, upper-right to middle-left.
- Subtle grain texture.

Color palette: {palette}.

What to avoid:
- No literal funnel diagrams as the centerpiece. No money imagery.
- No human faces, no avatars, no megaphone icons, no dollar bill icons.
- No icons inside the pills.
- No code text rendered.
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No additional pills beyond the 8 listed.

Output: a single high-quality cover image, print-ready, 4K.

hero.prompt:
Wide hero banner for a squeeze page giving away "The 2026 Low-Ticket Funnel Playbook". Aspect: 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
- NO rendered text.
- No font names or typography labels.

Composition: a 3D-rendered isometric mockup of a US-letter PDF cover floating on the right third, soft drop shadow on a textured editorial background. The PDF cover shows the same playbook design with 8 pill labels visible. On the left two-thirds: a faint repeating step-down motif in #06B6D4 at 12 percent opacity (abstract horizontal rounded rectangles arranged as a descending stair, suggesting a multi-step funnel from wide top to narrow bottom). A single thin diagonal accent line in bright cyan across the upper third.

Background:
- Top half: deep indigo #1A0B4B fading to electric purple #7C3AED.
- Bottom half: off-white #FAF9FF with faint mesh gradient bloom.
- PDF mockup on the dividing line.
- Subtle paper grain.

Style:
- Premium editorial, restrained.
- No people, no faces, no money imagery, no checkout cart icons, no megaphone icons.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single 4K hero image.

og.prompt:
Open Graph social share card image, 1.91:1 widescreen.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. Contains ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. No font names or typography instructions.
3. Spell every word exactly as written.

TEXT TO RENDER:
A. Top-left small pill, uppercase: AI BRANDFACTORY
B. Centered massive headline two lines: line 1 reads "The 2026 Low-Ticket", line 2 reads "Funnel Playbook".
C. Below headline, off-white rounded subtitle pill, one line: For SaaS, professional services, and local businesses
D. Below subtitle pill, horizontal text strip with middle-dot separators: Funnel Math · Architecture · Pages · Vertical Plays · Email Sequence · Compliance · Pricing · Failures
E. Bottom-right small label, faded: files.aibrandfactory.com

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top-left pill: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4.
- Headline: massive bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF.
- Subtitle: clean medium-weight sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside pill.
- Channels strip: clean medium-weight sans-serif, bright cyan #06B6D4, smaller size.
- Bottom-right label: clean sans-serif, off-white 70%.

Background: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient 135 degrees, faded step-down motif on the right third in bright cyan low opacity. Single thin diagonal accent line in bright cyan upper third.

What to avoid:
- No people, no faces, no money imagery, no megaphone icons, no clip art, no emoji.
- No additional text beyond the pieces listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: sharp, ready as og:image.

notion-cover.prompt:
Wide editorial banner for a Notion page header. Aspect 21:9.

CRITICAL CONSTRAINT: NO title, NO headline, NO wordmark, NO logo, NO labels in the corners.

Composition:
- Background: deep indigo #1A0B4B on the left fading to electric purple #7C3AED on the right, subtle bright cyan #06B6D4 bloom upper right.
- Across the entire frame edge-to-edge, an abstract step-down composition: a series of horizontal rounded rectangles arranged in a descending stair shape from upper-left to lower-right. Six to seven steps total, each progressively narrower and lower, suggesting a multi-step funnel architecture. All clean off-white outlines on the indigo-to-purple background.
- A single thin diagonal accent line in bright cyan from upper-left to mid-right.
- Subtle paper grain.

What to avoid:
- No corner text. No wordmark. No logos.
- No money imagery, no checkout cart icons.
- No text or labels inside any of the steps.
- No emoji, no clip art.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 4K cinematic banner.
